description: Greek telemedicine startup providing video consultation platform connecting patients with doctors. Offers primary care, specialist consultations, and prescription services.
business_model: B2C - Direct to patients; B2B for corporate health programs
target_market: Greek consumers and employers seeking convenient healthcare access
competitive_advantage: Early mover in Greek telemedicine, local market knowledge

varden_fit.rationale: Entry point into Greek market - early-stage, affordable acquisition target
